title: Fluffy Fermented Ukrainian Sun-dried Tomatoes Stir-fry
description: This low-calorie-friendly stir-fry features fluffy fermented sun-dried tomatoes in a romantic Ukrainian dish, ideal for adding to any meal of the day.
instructions: Preheat a wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sesame oil, and once hot, add garlic cloves. Stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add fermented sun-dried tomatoes, oyster sauce, soy sauce, and rice vinegar to the pan. Mix well until the sauce is evenly distributed among the ingredients.
Toss in sliced bell peppers and finely chopped scallions, ensuring everything is coated with the sauce mixture.
Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes until all vegetables are tender yet slightly crispy.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course depending on your preference.
